Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
🔐 Add complete login system with email authentication

✨ Features:
- Beautiful login screen with dark theme
- Email-only authentication (no password required)
- JWT token-based session management
- Auto-redirect to login when not authenticated
- User info display in header with logout
- Database table for users management
- Session persistence and token validation
- Seed data script with sample Facebook Ads data

🗄️ Database updates:
- New usuarios table for authentication
- Enhanced init script with user management
- Seed script with real Facebook Ads data (Magazzi accounts)

🎨 UI/UX improvements:
- Responsive login form with loading states
- User email display in header
- Logout functionality
- Seamless authentication flow

🔧 Backend enhancements:
- Auth routes (/api/auth/login, /api/auth/logout, /api/auth/me)
- Auth middleware for API protection
- JWT token generation and validation
- Session management with express-session
- Optional auth middleware for backward compatibility

🤖 Generated with Claude Code (https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
🔒 Restrict login access to authorized emails only

✨ Security Enhancement:
- Only vini@code.com and renato@code.com can access
- Frontend validation with clear error messages
- Backend validation for double security
- Updated login form with authorized email hints

🛡️ Security Features:
- Email whitelist validation on both client and server
- Clear error messages for unauthorized access
- Updated placeholder text with authorized emails
- 403 Forbidden response for unauthorized emails

🎨 UI Improvements:
- Updated form label to "Email autorizado"
- Placeholder shows authorized email examples
- Client-side validation before API call
- Better user feedback for access restrictions

🤖 Generated with Claude Code (https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
🔧 Fix date conversion bug in Pagamento model

🐛 Bug fix:
- Fixed static method call in date conversion
- Changed this.converterDataParaMySQL to Pagamento.converterDataParaMySQL
- Resolves MySQL date format error during seed data insertion

📊 Database compatibility:
- Ensures proper MySQL DATE format (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Fixes seed script execution
- Prevents ER_TRUNCATED_WRONG_VALUE errors

🤖 Generated with Claude Code (https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(git commit -m "Add quick-seed script with correct MySQL date format")

Bash(git commit -m "🔒 Remove email hints from login form for security
